inputs.text: Main thoda bukhaar aur thakaan mehsoos kar rahi hoon

inputs.text: Mujhe raat ko pasina aata hai, aur main wazan bhi kam kar rahi hoon

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis

inputs.text: Ab mujhe bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, aur khaansi mein kabhi-kabhi khoon bhi aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
